risk_description: User creating and closing opportunities can fabricate revenue pipeline.
User editing opportunities and managing forecasts can inflate projections.
User creating and approving quotes can authorize unauthorized discounts.
User managing pricing and creating quotes can manipulate deal terms.
User assigning territories and closing deals can route opportunities for personal gain.
User creating and approving contracts bypasses deal approval controls.
User creating and closing cases can fabricate resolution metrics.
User assigning and closing cases can manipulate team performance.
User creating campaigns and managing budgets can misallocate marketing spend.
User creating and converting leads can fabricate qualified pipeline.
User importing and deleting data can replace records to cover manipulation.
User exporting and deleting can exfiltrate then destroy evidence.
User importing data and managing users can bulk-create unauthorized accounts.
User managing users and roles can grant unlimited system access.
User managing users and profiles can escalate permissions.
User managing flows and schema can create backdoor data access.
User managing automation and API can create unauthorized integrations.
User closing deals and managing pricing can retroactively change deal terms.
User managing forecasts and exporting can leak financial projections.
User creating and deleting accounts can fabricate and destroy customer records.
